backend_identity: python3 scripts/packy_rubric_judge.py --base-url https://www.packyapi.com/v1 --prompt-version aesthetic-v4 --model gpt-5.5 --output-mode full --timeout 240 --max-completion-tokens 1200 --image-detail high

backend_meta.command: python3 scripts/packy_rubric_judge.py --base-url https://www.packyapi.com/v1 --prompt-version aesthetic-v4 --model gpt-5.5 --output-mode full --timeout 240 --max-completion-tokens 1200 --image-detail high

occlusion_score_impact.scoring_rule: rubric_weights stay fixed; occlusion lowers the affected axis_scores.

result.rationale: 命中 [40,50) 档：页面有明确中巴彩票主题，米色底、深青书法字与红蓝球体形成可识别氛围，卡片和开奖球构成基本层级。但中乌/中文混排比例失衡，顶部导航拥挤，主标题笔画过大压迫正文；卡片边框、阴影和球体高光偏模板，缺少更系统的品牌资产与精修细节，未达 50+。
